keywords.news: I am busy. Please ask the citizens for news.
keywords.sell: Visit Carlin's shopkeepers to buy their fine wares.
keywords.queen: Queen Eloise is our beloved sovereign!
keywords.leader: Queen Eloise is our beloved sovereign!
keywords.job: It's my duty to protect our fair city.
keywords.army: Ask my sister Bunny for details.
keywords.guard: I am a guard and proud of it.
keywords.name: It's Miss Bonecrusher to you!
keywords.bonecrusher: The bonecrusher family has been serving in the army of Carlin for generations. My sister Bunny is the general of our army.
keywords.castle: The castle is in the northwest corner of the city.
keywords.knights: WOOF! WOOF! Go away with theese puny king's puppys.
keywords.of: WOOF! WOOF! Go away with theese puny king's puppys.
keywords.noodles: WOOF! WOOF! Go away with theese puny king's puppys.
keywords.secret: Ask a higher offical about that.
keywords.police: Ask a higher offical about that.
keywords.city: Behave well, while in the city, or we'll get you! Do you want to know where to find a shop or a guild?
keywords.shop: There's a smith, a provisioner, a tavern, a magic shop, and the royal post office, of course.
keywords.guild: In the city you will find the guildhouses of the Knights, the Paladins, the Druids, and the Sorcerers.
keywords.scum: We will get rid of all scum.
keywords.barbara: Fine warrioress, even if not of our family.
keywords.fenbala: Fine warrioress, even if not of our family.
keywords.bunny: My sister is in charge of our mighty army.
keywords.busty: We are Bonecrushers. Mess with one of us, and we all will come for you!
keywords.bambi: We are Bonecrushers. Mess with one of us, and we all will come for you!
keywords.blossom: We are Bonecrushers. Mess with one of us, and we all will come for you!
keywords.banor: Praise Banor! May the great warrior be with us!
keywords.graveyard: Stay away from the graveyard, it's haunted!
keywords.crypt: Stay away from the graveyard, it's haunted!
keywords.haunted: Strange things happen in our graveyard, and sometimes there are .. noises.
keywords.noise: I never heared them myself, but people, one can trust, did.
keywords.male$: Bah! Who cares about males? Let them do males' work, cleaning the sewers for example.
keywords.sewer: Sewers are filthy and disgusting. We let the men take care of them.
keywords.rebellion: What a joke. The men have no guts for a rebellion.
keywords.resistance: What a joke. The men have no guts for a rebellion.
keywords.tod$: There once was an adventurer with this name in town, made some trouble, got kicked out. No big deal.
keywords.ghostlands: In theory the ghostlands are of limits. But we don't enforce that. Anyone stupid enough to go there will meet his deserved fate.
keywords.fletcher: You can find the weapon and armour shops just west of the towncenter.
keywords.smith: You can find the weapon and armour shops just west of the towncenter.
keywords.weapon: You can find the weapon and armour shops just west of the towncenter.
keywords.armor: You can find the weapon and armour shops just west of the towncenter.
keywords.sarina: Sarina is our provisioner. You can find her in the towncenter, south of the weaponshops.
keywords.provision: Sarina is our provisioner. You can find her in the towncenter, south of the weaponshops.
keywords.dane: Dane runs the local tavern and hotel. You can find it at the southwest beach of Carlin.
keywords.tavern: Dane runs the local tavern and hotel. You can find it at the southwest beach of Carlin.
keywords.liane: Liane is a kind person. She runs the post office in the town's center.
keywords.post: Liane is a kind person. She runs the post office in the town's center.
keywords.depot: We have some depots in our town. You can't miss them.
keywords.lea$: Lea is the head of the local sorcerers guild. You can find it south of the towncenter at the magic shop of Rachel.
keywords.sorcerer: Lea is the head of the local sorcerers guild. You can find it south of the towncenter at the magic shop of Rachel.
keywords.legola: Legola runs the local paladins guild, it's near the westgate.
keywords.paladin: Legola runs the local paladins guild, it's near the westgate.
keywords.padreia: Padreia is the greatest druid of the continent. You find the guild of the benevolent druids in the southwest of the city.
keywords.druid: Padreia is the greatest druid of the continent. You find the guild of the benevolent druids in the southwest of the city.
keywords.trisha: Trisha is the leader of our knights guild. It is in the north of the town, near the gate.
keywords.knight: Trisha is the leader of our knights guild. It is in the north of the town, near the gate.
keywords.rachel: Rachel sells equipment for all magic users in her shop. There is also the sorcerer guild in the second floor.
keywords.magic: Rachel sells equipment for all magic users in her shop. There is also the sorcerer guild in the second floor.
keywords.spell: Rachel sells equipment for all magic users in her shop. There is also the sorcerer guild in the second floor.

texts: It's my duty to protect our fair city.
